type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Amount of clean cover stored on site decreased from 2021 to 2022. Therefore, PM emissions from storage piles are reduced. Distance travelled on unpaved roads was less than 10,000 km in 2022. Therefore, PM emissions from road dust were not included in 2022.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Amount of clean cover stored on site decreased from 2021 to 2022. Therefore, PM emissions from storage piles are reduced. Distance travelled on unpaved roads was less than 10,000 km in 2022. Therefore, PM emissions from road dust were not included in 2022.
